headline: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Southern to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $111
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   upgrades Southern (NYSE:SO) from In-Line to Outperform and raises the price target from $103 to $111.
